title: Tailwind CSS Plugins Quiz
description: Evaluate your understanding of official Tailwind plugins (Typography/Forms), custom plugin creation (addUtilities/Components), and encapsulating repetitive CSS logic.

questions.question: Which and/or what is the primarily reason to use Tailwind CSS plugins?
options: They provide robust, pre-built utilities for complex features (like long-form text styling or form resetting) and allow for sharing custom CSS components.
To hide the JavaScript code from the console.

questions.question: Which official Tailwind plugin provides a set of 'prose' classes for styling long-form text content like blogs or articles?
Can you use JavaScript to create your own custom Tailwind plugins in the 'tailwind.config.js' file?
options: Yes, using the 'plugins' section to define new utilities, components, or entire design systems.

questions.question: Which Tailwind plugin helps reset and style form input elements with utility classes?
Does Tailwind's plugin system allow you to encapsulate a group of utility classes into a single, reusable class like .my-card?
options: Yes, using the addComponents function in a custom plugin.
No, it only adds new utilities.
